## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss updates, new developments, and ongoing projects across multiple destinations.](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong growth in web traffic across all three destinations (Cabo, Vallarta, Cancun), particularly for whale-related content in Cabo](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [New tour launched in Cabo: "Orca Encounters, Whales, and Baja's Ocean Giants" in La Ventana](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Upcoming changes to Rhythms of the Night in Vallarta, including a new "gastronomic journey" package](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Mahavitas event booking system transitioning to TicketFairy for more flexible pricing options](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Significant traffic surge in Cabo, primarily driven by whale-related articles](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Improved keyword distribution and SERP features across destinations](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Vallarta experienced a surge in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Cancun saw a drop in Sargassum-related traffic as the season declines](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [7 new "what to pack" articles scheduled for publication this week](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### New Tour Launch: Orca Encounters in Cabo

  - [Location: La Ventana, 2.5 hours from Cabo San Lucas](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Unique selling point: Swimming with orcas and other marine wildlife now allowed](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Recent encounters: Pilot whales and large manta rays](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Tour name: "Orca Encounters, Whales, and Baja's Ocean Giants"](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Category: Whales and Wildlife](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Vallarta Adventures Updates

  - [Closure of Sonsens Gourmet Experience Tour](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [New Rhythms of the Night experience:](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [Third package option: "Gastronomic Journey"](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [Features 3-course signature menu by renowned Mexican chef](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [New landing page design with video, comparative chart, and booking engine](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [Additional content blocks for key figures (Mukhtar, Paco, Eugenio)](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Mahavitas Event Changes

  - [Transitioning to TicketFairy for flexible pricing options](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [New layout in development on Vallarta Adventures website](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Carousel display for different dates, DJs, and price brackets](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Focus on showcasing individual events with varying prices](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Seo to investigate crawlability issues for Vallarta Adventures website](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Lorena to review pending articles for Cabo](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Team to begin creating content for the new Orca Encounters tour](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Continue development of new Rhythms of the Night landing page and content](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Finalize Mahavitas event page layout and integration with TicketFairy](https://fathom.video/share/UVxUTZrsYCjtx9AxWamZhktmScyFnU1b?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
